case_title: MEABD LLC VS. TIFFANY FARRIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71911612) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC SERVED JAN-26-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARRIS, TIFFANY
